  • perryhowardpt

    Since I’ve just set up this account, I thought I’d share a quick introduction. 🤝

    I'm Perry. ​I’ve spent 20 years in the fitness industry. I've been a personal trainer, sports massage therapist, lecturer, and course writer. Currently I am working as an external verifier for Active IQ. I’m the one making sure the next generation of trainers are hitting the "Gold Standard." I love what I do, but here is a bit about my life outside of the professional world.

    ​⚽ The Goalkeeper: I still love getting between the sticks for Henley Town whenever my schedule allows.

    ​⛳ The Golfer: A hobby I enjoy to keep things varied. I love the challenge of the game and getting out on the course when I can.

    ​👨‍👩‍👦‍👦 The Family Man: A husband and a dad to two energetic boys. They are the main reason I’m so passionate about training for longevity.

    ​🐶 Our Frenchie: A big part of the family and my constant shadow. She certainly makes sure I get my steps in on our daily walks!

    ​After two decades in the game, my approach is straightforward: Train Smarter. Move Better. Feel better.

    I am currently taking on new clients for Personal Training, Corrective exercise , and professional PT Mentorship.

    If you’re interested in working together or have any questions, feel free to send me a message!

    ​#personaltrainer #ptmentor #movebetter #ﬁtnessgoals #ﬁtnesscoach
